DiskRenewal.action: Fixed value for this API: purchaseReserved
DiskRenewal.clientToken: Idempotency token; ASCII string up to 64 characters; see ClientToken Idempotency docs
DiskRenewal.billing: Custom renewal duration in months; if empty, aligns with the attached BCC expiration time; must be greater than (BCC expiry - CDS current expiry); valid range: 1–60 months
DiskRenewal.billing.paymentTiming: Payment method: Prepaid, Postpaid, or bidding
DiskRenewal.billing.reservation: Reservation info; required for Prepaid, not needed for Postpaid
DiskRenewal.instanceId: Prepaid BCC instance ID that the unattached disk is expected to be mounted to; required when disk is unattached; optional when already attached (may pass current instance ID)
